allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); logs=[e['text'] for item in data for e in json.loads\(item['text']\)['events']]; errors=[l for l in logs if 'error' in l.lower\(\) or 'Error' in l or 'failed' in l.lower\(\) or 'Failed' in l]; print\('\\n'.join\(errors[-50:]\)\)")
